$comment: Snapshot of the Claude Code plugin.json schema contract as exercised by `claude plugin validate --strict`. Fields marked required mirror the strict-validation failures documented in issue #766 / PR #797. Update this fixture when the upstream Claude Code plugin contract changes.

name.description: Plugin identifier — must be kebab-case (no colon, uppercase, or space) for namespace safety. Drives the /<name>: command namespace.

version.description: SemVer string. Required by --strict; must track package.json version.

repository.description: Must be a URL (string form, not an object) pointing to the canonical repo.

commands.description: Path (relative to plugin root) to the commands directory, ending with '/'.

hooks.description: Path (relative to plugin root) to the hooks.json file.
